requirement: The role has THREE mandatory requirements, all of which must be met: (1) a COMPLETED undergraduate degree specifically as a Civil Engineer; (2) a COMPLETED Master's degree in an engineering field (civil, structural, environmental, geotechnical, hydraulic, transportation or closely related engineering); (3) at least 5 years of professional experience. A specialization is not a master's. An in-progress, unfinished, or undated degree does not count as completed.
